{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Tanakite cloth
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Zeth]] wore [[Tanakite cloth]] over his shoulders.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
